title: Roasted Dutch Pumpkin Tart En Croute
description: A sweet and crispy Dutch dish featuring roasted pumpkin in a flaky crust, perfect for a special occasion or meal prep.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, sugar, and salt.
Add the cold butter to the bowl and use a pastry blender to work it into the flour mixture until it resembles coarse crumbs.
Press the mixture into the bottom and up the sides of a donabe.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
Add the cubed pumpkin to the bowl and toss to coat with the egg mixture.
Pour the pumpkin mixture into the donabe.
Roll out any remaining crust mixture to fit the top of the donabe and crimp the edges to seal.
Cut a few slits in the top crust to allow steam to escape.
Bake the tart for 40 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the filling is set.
